creator: support@spectrum.ru
text:
The 'libxcb' and 'libtool' installed from the ports tree.
pkg_info | grep libxcb = libxcb-1.7
pkg_info | grep libtool = libtool-2.4.2

How-To-Repeat: 1. cd /usr/ports/mail/evolution
2. make
